sentences.arabic: أَنْهَى فَرِيقُ الْمَدْرَسَةِ مَوْسِمَهُ بِفَوْزِ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Školski tim je završio sezonu velikom pobjedom.
sentences.translationEn: The school team ended their season with a big win.

sentences.arabic: فَازَ الْفَرِيقُ عَلَى خَصْمِهِ بِأَرْبَعَةِ أَهْدَافٍ مُقَابِلَ صِفْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Tim je pobijedio protivnika sa četiri gola na nulu.
sentences.translationEn: The team defeated their opponent four goals to zero.

sentences.arabic: احْتَفَلَ الطُّلَّابُ وَالْمُعَلِّمُونَ مَعًا بِهَذَا الإِنْجَازِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici i nastavnici su zajedno proslavili ovaj uspjeh.
sentences.translationEn: The students and teachers celebrated this achievement together.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدَ الْفَرِيقُ بِتَقْدِيمِ أَفْضَلِ أَدَاءٍ فِي الْمَوْسِمِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Tim je obećao da će pružiti bolji nastup u narednoj sezoni.
sentences.translationEn: The team promised to deliver better performance next season.
